contents.signup_email_dup: Someone attempted to create an account using this email address, but could not be created because an account has already been made using it.
contents.pin_content:
You attempted to sign in with unrecognized device.
If this is really you, please enter the PIN below.
PIN: {{-pin}}

This PIN is only valid for 10 minutes.
contents.change_email_content: This is an email verification for changing the email address of {{value}}.
contents.change_email_dup: An email change was attempted with this email, but an account has already been created with this email, so no further accounts can be created.
contents.recover_password_content:
Password recovery mail for {{user}}.
If you'd like to recover your account's password, please click the link below.
{{-linkOpen}}[Recover Password]{{-linkClose}}

This link is only valid for 24 hours.

activate_otp.install_app: Install an authenticator application on your mobile device to register a One-Time Password (OTP).
activate_otp.other_app: In addition to the examples above, you can use any authenticator application of your preference.
activate_otp.understand: Proceed only if you understand how setting up a One-Time Password will affect your account.
activate_otp.follow_step: Follow the steps displayed on the screen.
activate_otp.mobile_guide: If you are trying to register on a mobile device, you can tap the QR code to register directly into the authenticator app.
activate_otp.secret_key_guide: If you cannot use the QR code, please use the secret key below.
activate_otp.put_code_for_enable: You can enable two-factor authentication by entering the One-Time Password below.

notifications.permission_denied: Browser notification permission was denied. Please allow this permission in the browser settings.

pin_verification.new_device: You signed in from an unrecognized device.
pin_verification.passkey_verify: Two-factor authentication will proceed using a passkey.
pin_verification.otp_verify: Please enter your code from Google Authenticator.
pin_verification.email_verify: Please enter the PIN we sent via email({email}).
pin_verification.otp_method_description: Authenticate by entering a one-time verification code received from email or OTP app.
pin_verification.passkey_method_description: Authenticate using fingerprint, facial recognition, or a security key.

recover_password_email_sent.message: An account recovery verification email has been sent to ({email}). Please complete the verification via the email that arrived in your inbox.
recover_password_email_sent.list_1: If the information you entered is incorrect, the email will not be sent.
recover_password_email_sent.list_2: Sometimes the email does not arrive. In this case, please check your spam folder.
recover_password_email_sent.list_3: The verification email is valid for 24 hours.

signup_email_sent.message: An account creation verification email has been sent to ({email}). Please continue the account creation via the email in your inbox.

signup_verify.message: Your current IP frequently experiences vandalism (reason: {{note}}), so additional verification is required to create an account.

signup_verify_code.message: Please enter the PIN sent to the phone number you provided.

withdraw.last_activity: Account deletion is available after {{duration}} has passed since your last activity.
withdraw.no_recover: Clicking the delete account button instantly deletes all data and recovery is impossible.
withdraw.no_signup_duration: However, re-registration is prohibited for {{blacklistDays}} days,
withdraw.hash_save_duration: To enforce this, emails and other PII will be stored as an irreversible one-way hash for {{blacklistDays}} days after deletion (permanent bans may be stored permanently).
withdraw.hash_save_forever: To enforce this, emails and other PII will be permanently stored as an irreversible one-way hash after account deletion.

acl.no_rule: No rules exist. {tabLink} will be applied.

backlink.no_backlink: No backlinks exist for this document.

delete.agree: I confirm this is for deleting the entire document, not moving it or removing partial content.
delete.notify_content: If you want to change the document title, please use the {moveLink} feature. If you cannot use the move feature, please request assistance via the discuss feature or the notice board.
delete.check_agree: Please check the guide on document deletion.

edit_request.edit_tooltip_not_self: Only the requester can modify it.

edit_request.reopen_tooltip_missing_perm: Only the requester or a user with sufficient permissions can reopen this edit request.
